support_panel.description: Create a support ticket or review your existing tickets.

settings.title: Tickets! Please settings
settings.description: Base ticket-system configuration for this server.

setup.title: Tickets! Please setup complete
setup.description: Base channel structure was created or updated.

status.title: Tickets! Please status
status.not_configured: The ticket system is not configured yet. Run `/tickets-setup`.

reset.title: Tickets! Please reset
reset.done: Saved configuration was removed. Discord channels were not deleted.

errors.server_only: This action only works in a server.
errors.panel_message_missing: Could not identify the panel message.
errors.settings_message_missing: Could not identify the settings message.
errors.ticket_message_missing: Could not identify the ticket message.
errors.button_failed: Could not process this button. Details were written to bot logs.
errors.ticket_list_failed: Could not get your ticket list. Details were written to bot logs.
errors.everyone_role: `@everyone` cannot be selected as the support role.
errors.settings_permission: You do not have permission to change ticket settings.
errors.setup_required: The ticket system is not configured yet. Run `/tickets-setup`.
errors.settings_stale: This settings panel is stale. Use the current message.
errors.support_role_update_failed: Could not update the support role. Details were written to bot logs.
errors.language_update_failed: Could not update the language. Details were written to bot logs.
errors.close_failed: Could not process ticket closure. Details were written to bot logs.
errors.command_server_only: This command is only available in a server.
errors.missing_user_permissions: You do not have enough permissions to manage the ticket system. Missing: {permissions}.
errors.missing_bot_permissions: The bot lacks permissions to configure channels. Missing: {permissions}.
errors.setup_forbidden: Discord denied the action because of permissions. Check the bot role and channel management permissions.
errors.setup_rejected: Discord rejected the setup request. Details were written to bot logs.
errors.setup_failed: Could not complete setup. Details were written to bot logs.
errors.status_failed: Could not get status. Details were written to bot logs.
errors.reset_failed: Could not reset settings. Details were written to bot logs.

ticket.category_missing: The ticket category is not configured. An administrator must run `/tickets-setup` again.
ticket.thread_not_linked: This thread is not linked to a saved ticket.
ticket.already_closed: This ticket is already closed and cannot be reopened.
ticket.close_forbidden: You do not have permission to close this ticket.
ticket.system_not_configured: The ticket system is not configured yet. An administrator must run `/tickets-setup`.
ticket.system_disabled: The ticket system is currently disabled.
ticket.support_panel_stale: This support panel is stale. Use the current message in the support channel.
ticket.limit_reached: You already have the maximum number of open tickets ({limit}). Close one before creating a new ticket.
ticket.author: Author
ticket.files_hint: If needed, attach files as the next message in this thread.
ticket.subject: Subject
ticket.archive_failed: The ticket was closed in the database, but the thread could not be archived.
ticket.closed_thread_description: This ticket is closed. If you need help with a new issue, create a new ticket.

my_tickets.title: My tickets
my_tickets.description: Open tickets and recently closed tickets.
my_tickets.empty: You do not have any tickets yet.

modals.problem_description_placeholder: Describe the problem and what you have already tried
modals.too_short: Please provide a more detailed subject and description.
modals.thread_message_failed: The ticket was created, but the bot could not send the thread message.
modals.create_forbidden: The bot lacks permissions to create the ticket channel or thread.
modals.create_rejected: Discord rejected ticket creation. Details were written to bot logs.
modals.create_unexpected: Could not create the ticket. Details were written to bot logs.
modals.confirmation_mismatch: Closure cancelled: confirmation did not match.
modals.close_forbidden: The bot lacks permissions to close or archive the ticket.
modals.close_rejected: Discord rejected ticket closure. Details were written to bot logs.
modals.close_unexpected: Could not close the ticket. Details were written to bot logs.
